title: VSUDO Blackout Window Film Privacy - Black Frosted Privacy Film for Glass Windows, Window Blackout Material Film, Black Out Window Cover for Living Room and Office (30x200 cm)
features: BLACKOUT PRIVACY PROTECTION WINDOW FILM, PRIVACY LEVEL:★★★★★: Our premium blackout window film will protect your privacy well day and night. This black out stick blind designed for the living room /bathroom/bedroom/kitchen/office windows, front door window, sliding glass doors, glass cabinet panels etc.
DECORATIVE BLACK OUT WINDOW FILM, NEW LOOK FOR YOUR WINDOW: This décor window blackout film will make your house or office much more modern and fashionable.
ENERGY SAVING, ANTI-UV BLACK OUT WINDOW COVER: Blackout frosted window film for windows, protect your favorite furniture, retain heat in winter and heat insulation in summer, healthy and comfortable.
BLACKOUT MATERIAL STATIC WINDOW FILM, EASY TO USE: The static cling decor black window film apply to any smooth glass surface in minutes, it can be trimmed or combined to fit any size window.

NO ADHESIVE, ECO-FRIENDLY PRIVACY BLACK WINDOW FILM: No glue design, advanced blackout material. This privacy window film can be reused for 2-3 times if not be damaged. Leaving no residue after removal.
